role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of linguistic evidence (no signs) and abstained from assessment.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Olea europaea, Oleander) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, infrastructure (walls, utility lines), and building codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and infrastructure quality to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Greece. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (olive groves, white-washed architecture, stone walls) without hallucination. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the specific architectural details (concrete-capped stone wall) that favor Greece over Italy.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described olive groves, red soil, and white buildings.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified olive trees and oleander.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the narrow road and stone wall.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly linked architectural features to the region.
